hero.subtitle: Built in the AI era. Not retrofitted for it. Traditional IT agencies are bloated, slow, and expensive by design. We are an AI-native engineering team that ships Silicon Valley-grade custom software in weeks, not months. Lean architecture, rapid execution, zero bloat. Transparent pricing, not quote-only mystery.

cards.title: Fixed Price Guarantee
cards.us: We scope the work and give you a fixed price. No surprises.
cards.them: Hourly billing that incentivizes them to work slowly and bloat your bill.

cards.title: 48-Hour Proposals
cards.us: Get a detailed technical proposal and fixed quote within 48 hours of our scoping call.
cards.them: Wait 2-3 weeks just to get an estimated 'range' from their sales team.

cards.title: AI-Native Speed
cards.us: We use AI to accelerate boilerplate coding, shipping your product 40% faster.
cards.them: Bloated teams manually writing every line of code, delaying your launch.

cards.title: Fixed Scope
cards.desc: Defined project, defined price. Best for clear, bounded requirements.

cards.title: Ongoing Partner
cards.desc: Retained/dedicated ongoing work. Best for evolving requirements and long-term support.

cards.title: App Store Ready-Made
cards.desc: Pre-scoped vertical apps ready for customization. Fixed pricing tiers.

cards.title: Startups
cards.desc: Rapid MVP development, cloud architecture, and go-to-market engineering. Launch your product without burning venture capital.

cards.title: Micro & Small Business
cards.desc: Affordable websites, WhatsApp AI, and local SEO to digitize your local operations. From ₹15K.

cards.title: Growing SMBs
cards.desc: Custom CRMs, workflow automation, and digital marketing that scales with your growth. Eliminate spreadsheet chaos.

cards.title: Large Enterprises
cards.desc: Cloud migrations, AI agents, and secure enterprise platforms at scale. Enterprise-grade engineering without the enterprise price tag.

cards.title: Custom Web Applications
cards.desc: High-performance, scalable web apps built with Next.js, React, and modern cloud architecture. Blazing fast load times, SEO optimization, and flawless user experiences across all devices.

cards.title: WhatsApp & AI Automation
cards.desc: Turn WhatsApp into a revenue engine. AI chatbots, automated ticketing systems, and integrated CRM workflows directly into the tools your customers already use.

cards.title: Custom CRMs & Dashboards
cards.desc: Stop paying for bloated SaaS products. Bespoke CRMs and internal tools tailored exactly to your operational workflows, giving you total data ownership and zero per-seat licensing fees.

cards.title: Lean Cloud Infrastructure
cards.desc: Serverless architecture that scales infinitely but costs pennies when idle. Cloudflare Workers, Firebase, and Vercel for enterprise-grade reliability without the massive AWS bill.

studies.title: Custom CRM for Regional Real Estate
studies.impact: Built a custom CRM that handles end-to-end customer relationships — lead capture, inventory tracking, booking management — replacing spreadsheets with a single dashboard.

studies.title: Real Estate Property Platform
studies.impact: Delivered a complete property listing and management platform with buyer-facing search, project pages with amenities and photos, and an admin dashboard for inventory management.

studies.title: B2B WhatsApp Ordering & Automation
studies.impact: Built a WhatsApp-first ordering system for B2B pharmacy distribution — automated order capture, invoicing, and follow-ups with zero new app downloads required from retailers.

steps.title: Discovery & Scoping
steps.desc: We strip away the noise. We analyze your core business problem and propose a lean, high-impact technical architecture.

steps.title: Agile Build
steps.desc: We build in rapid sprints. You get weekly video updates, staging links, and complete transparency into the codebase.

steps.title: Deployment & Handoff
steps.desc: We deploy to production, setup analytics, and provide full documentation. You own 100% of the IP and infrastructure.

items.q: How long does an MVP take to build?
items.a: Our senior engineers work in rapid sprints, and we typically deliver a complete, launch-ready MVP in 4 to 8 weeks depending on the complexity of the requirements.

items.q: What is the typical cost for a custom software project?
items.a: For standard scopes like web applications or internal CRMs, pricing generally ranges from ₹2-8L depending on scope. For fully bespoke enterprise solutions, we provide a quote-based estimate after a scoping call.

items.q: Are you the best software development company in Lucknow?
items.a: We believe our results speak for themselves. We bring Silicon Valley-grade engineering to Indian MSMEs across the country without the bloat of traditional IT agencies. We focus purely on lean architecture and rapid execution.

items.q: How do I know I'll actually own my app or software?
items.a: We believe in complete transparency. We've published a due-diligence checklist covering code ownership, app store accounts, and hosting. We assign full source code and IP to you upon final payment, and give you direct access to all infrastructure.

cta.title: Ready to build something exceptional?
cta.description: Stop settling for mediocre agencies. Let us discuss your product roadmap and engineer a solution that accelerates your growth.
